title: Sabo Reveals the Truth of the Levely
description: On pages 4–6, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, King Bekori, Dragon, Unknown person #5, Celestial Dragons, York as World events shift toward Cross Guild, Sabo’s account of the Levely, Cobra’s death, Imu, the Five Elders, and the Revolutionary Army’s next move.
scene: World events shift toward Cross Guild, Sabo’s account of the Levely, Cobra’s death, Imu, the Five Elders, and the Revolutionary Army’s next move.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If I can just make it to luluia...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: ...I know I can figure something out.

dialogue.speaker: Dragon
dialogue.text: I'm counting on you, SABO- KUN!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...For the two key stories to spread across the globe:

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The murder of King cobra of Arabasta and the disappearance of his daughter, Princess Vivi.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: He seems to have a checkered fate...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How else can you account for him constantly being surrounded by those who bear the letter "D."

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was hoping we would be able to see to the egghead issue now, but it seems that dealing with this complication will have to take priority.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: ...To put vegapunk's invention to the test...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It is true, we haven't had the chance to try it out before now...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...so there is no way to ascertain its effectiveness yet.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Depending on how well this experiment goes, egghead may reconsider its response.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I think a forest area would be a more suitable testing ground than a sea based target--

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: quite a lot of people live there.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: That is of no conse- offence.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The world moves at the will of the creator...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: What is the reason for Lulsia's selection?

summary: This part advances the Cross Guild and Reverie Truth through 36 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
